title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. rostkoviana
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. rostkoviana, also known as the Eyebright plant, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Euphrasia and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. rostkoviana include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia officinalis subsp. rostkoviana can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and eye drops, which are commonly used to treat eye and respiratory problems.
